project.title: Mi hermana me ahogó. Desperté el día de mi boda. - Parte 2
project.subtitle: La que llegó primero
project.hook: La noche de mi boda me encerré en el baño donde voy a morir.

sentada_comedor.prompt: Same character Da-eun, same face and long black hair, same bone-white blouse and dark skirt, seated on a formal dining chair, upright posture, both hands resting on the table edge in front of her, feet flat on the floor, guarded expression, neutral studio background.

Same character Mi-rae, same face and shoulder-length hair, same emerald green silk dress, seated on a formal dining chair, upright posture, both hands folded on the table edge in front of her, feet flat on the floor, sweet attentive smile, neutral studio background.

camisa_casa.prompt: Same character Seo-jin, same face and swept-back hair, plain white dress shirt with the sleeves rolled to the forearm and no jacket, standing upright, both hands at his sides, polite cold expression, neutral studio background.
